title: triodia lanigera
intro: Triodia lanigera, also known as black grass or spinifex, is a type of grass that is native to the deserts and grasslands of western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Triodia lanigera include soothing skin irritations and wounds, as well as aiding in the relief of fever and respiratory issues. Triodia lanigera can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
